remember: Students will be able to recall the various schemes and policies of the government for promoting women in sports.
Students will be able to list out the benefits of involving children and women in sports.
Students will be able to mention the importance of women's participation in sports at the international level.
understand: Students will be able to understand the role of women in sports and their contribution to the country's growth and development.
Students will be able to analyze the challenges faced by women in sports and the ways to overcome them.
Students will be able to comprehend the significance of involving children in sports and its effects on their physical and mental health.
apply: Students will be able to apply the knowledge of schemes and policies to promote women in sports.
Students will be able to design a plan to involve children in sports and promote their physical and mental well-being.
Students will be able to participate in sports activities and demonstrate the importance of team spirit and fair play.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the impact of sports on women's empowerment and the role of government schemes in promoting women's participation in sports.
Students will be able to evaluate the benefits and challenges of involving children in sports and suggest ways to overcome the challenges.
Students will be able to compare the participation of men and women in sports and suggest ways to increase women's participation.

ncert_objectives: To understand the importance of women's participation in sports and their contribution to the country's growth and development.
To analyze the challenges faced by women in sports and the ways to overcome them.
To comprehend the significance of involving children in sports and its effects on their physical and mental health.
board_exam_objectives: To identify the role of government schemes in promoting women's participation in sports.
To describe the benefits of involving children in sports and its impact on their physical and mental health.
To explain the importance of sports in promoting women's empowerment and the country's growth and development.
